pi_items.source: setup_moodle.sh creates course with shortname='BIO101', task description references 'Introduction to Biology (BIO101) course'
task.json description explicitly states 'Name it "Week 1 Documents"'

task.json description states 'Display folder contents: "On a separate page"' which corresponds to database value 1; verifier.py confirms display_mode==1 means 'On a separate page' (0 is Inline); Moodle documentation confirms 1=separate page (default), 0=inline

task.json description states 'Show download folder button: Checked/Yes' which corresponds to database value 1; verifier.py confirms show_download==1 means enabled/checked; Moodle documentation confirms showdownloadfolder=1 enables download button

privileged_info_summary: The task creates a Folder resource in the BIO101 course (Introduction to Biology). The course is pre-created in the environment via setup_moodle.sh with shortname='BIO101' and fullname='Introduction to Biology'. The folder must be named 'Week 1 Documents' and contain two files: 'Syllabus_Supplement.txt' and 'Lab_Safety_Checklist.txt'. The folder must be configured with display_mode=1 (On a separate page, the default) and showdownloadfolder=1 (download button enabled). The environment is a real Moodle LMS instance with MariaDB backend, not synthetic data.
